# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Currently, only the `main` branch is receiving security updates.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of EcoTrack seriously. If you discover a security vulnerability, please do NOT report it by opening a public GitHub issue. 

Instead, please send an email to the repository owner or open a private security advisory through GitHub. We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours and provide an estimated timeline for the fix.

Please include:
* A detailed description of the vulnerability.
* Steps to reproduce the issue.
* Potential impact.
